summary: Completed testing of House Sharing Seniors platform updates - dark mode fix, Browse Properties button, Housing Type dropdown labels, and Properties page with filters all verified working correctly
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with empty property list
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features working correctly. Homepage loads with light theme (rgb(255, 255, 255) background). Browse Properties button visible in header and navigates to /properties. Housing Type dropdown shows correct descriptive labels. Properties page displays all filters (City, State, Property Type, Min Bedrooms, Max Rent, Amenities) and shows '0 properties found' message when empty. Backend API /api/properties returns empty array. Email notifications are MOCKED (logged to console only).
